description_long: This is a cylindrical, vertically-ribbed trash bin with a dark, matte finish, commonly seen in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, and alleys. The body is made of metal, featuring evenly spaced vertical ridges for structural reinforcement and a slightly tapered base. The lid is flat with a raised, rectangular handle at the center, designed for easy lifting and removal. There are no visible wheels or side handles, indicating it is intended to be carried or lifted from the top. The surface shows subtle wear and texture, suggesting durability and frequent use. The bin is unmarked, with no visible signage or labels.
description: A dark, cylindrical metal trash bin with vertical ridges and a flat, handled lid. It has a matte finish and no visible markings or wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat lid with a central rectangular handle and the ribbed cylindrical body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the same handle and ribbed structure, with the handle slightly angled.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 1, with the handle's orientation more centered.
description_view_3: Rear view with the handle visible, showing consistent ribbing and no additional features.
